{"code":"
(def prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(println "total open PRs:" (count prs))
(println "by repo:" (frequencies (map :repo prs)))
(let [by-repo (frequencies (map :repo prs))
      winner (apply max-key val by-repo)]
  (println "top repo:" (key winner) "with" (val winner) "open PRs"))"}
